# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I reviewed the current working-tree diff and corresponding implementation paths (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs:478-515`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:166-205`, and related prompt-builder tests in `tests/unit/prompt_builder_test.rs:535-779`). No actionable correctness, safety, or robustness findings were identified in the modified runtime artifacts; the scope-guidance logic and insertion behavior are covered by tests.

## Amendments

None.
